What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A woman with brown hair pulled back wears a bright green long-sleeved top with a small black microphone clipped to the collar. She stands in a kitchen featuring a white subway tile backsplash and white cabinets with copper handles. A stainless steel microwave is mounted inside an upper cabinet on the left side. A wire fruit basket containing lemons and limes sits on the counter near a black coffee machine and white toaster.
